score_reason: Senior Creative Director title checks out, but telehealth/weight management e-commerce is outside Travis's advertising/brand/AI creative focus area—no traditional campaigns, brand identity work, or creative tech angle evident.

title: Strategic Core Account Executive CPG Databricks

score_reason: Enterprise software sales to CPG companies is the opposite of weird/creative—solid job, zero entertainment value for a Creative Director with AI skills.

title: Signifyd: Senior Product Manager, Identity & Intelligence Platform
score_reason: Senior PM at a fraud-detection platform is smart work, but lacks the creative weirdness and AI experimentation that would light up a Creative Director's brain in Costa Rica.

title: Affirm: Senior Product Manager, Financial Reporting
score_reason: Financial reporting PM role is solid but about as creatively thrilling as a spreadsheet—not the weird/fun intersection Travis is looking for.

title: Vivid: Senior Product Designer (Hybrid or Remote)
score_reason: Standard product design role at a corporate fintech—solid but missing the quirk, creative freedom, and AI-forward weirdness that'd make a Creative Director actually grin.

title: Doordash Usa: Staff Product Manager, People Product
score_reason: Standard corporate product management at a mega-corp—exactly the kind of buttoned-up, process-heavy role that would make him miss the creative chaos he already has.

title: Vivid: WFM / RTM - Customer Support
score_reason: Customer support WFM/RTM is the opposite of creative freedom—spreadsheets and scheduling, not storytelling and AI innovation.

title: Addepar: Sr. Product Designer II
score_reason: Senior fintech product design role—solid career move but the opposite of quirky entertainment; Travis would find this resume-padding, not smile-inducing.

title: Reddit: Staff Product Designer, Ads Platform
score_reason: Staff Product Designer for ads platform = corporate design grind with zero creative freedom, the opposite of what makes Travis tick.

title: Ava Labs: Senior Product Designer - Institutional Custody
score_reason: Crypto product design is interesting but this is standard corporate product work—not weird enough, not creative-freedom enough, and the blockchain space feels played out for someone already deep in AI.

title: Kentik: Principal Product Marketing Manager
score_reason: Network infrastructure PMM is smart work but trades creative freedom for B2B SaaS playbooks—fine job, not a smile-inducing one for a creative director.

title: Underdog Sports: Senior Product Designer, Motion
score_reason: Creative motion design for a fun sports tech company hits the creativity sweet spot, but 'Senior Product Designer' feels a bit corporate-structured for someone craving weird/niche inspiration in Costa Rica.

title: Accela: Sr Director, Product Marketing and Strategy
score_reason: Senior corporate product marketing role sounds like the structured, high-accountability work he's already doing—fun creative freedom is likely low despite the remote setup.
